whatsapp.expiryAlert:
⚠️ *Medicine Expiry Alert*
The following medicines are nearing expiry (within {{months}} months):
{{list}}
Please review stock and consider returning to supplier.
whatsapp.refillReminder:
🙏 *Refill Reminder from {{pharmacyName}}*
Hi {{patientName}}, this is a friendly reminder that your refill for *{{medicineName}}* is due on {{dueDate}}.
You have {{quantityLeft}} {{unit}} left. Please visit the pharmacy or reply with "REFILL" to confirm your pickup.
Thank you!
whatsapp.orderStatus:
📦 *Order Update*
Your order #{{orderId}} has been received and is being prepared.
Expected ready for pickup: {{pickupTime}}.
Reply with any questions.

telegram.welcome:
Welcome to AI Pharmacy Bot!

You can check medicine availability in two ways:
1. Use command: /check <medicine>
2. Just type the medicine name directly (e.g., paracetamol)

Other commands:
/help - Show this help message
/status - Check application status
telegram.help:
AI Pharmacy Bot Usage:

1. Direct medicine name: Send just the medicine name (e.g., paracetamol)
2. Command format: Use /check <medicine> (e.g., /check paracetamol)

Both methods will show:
• Availability status
• MRP (price per unit)
• Quantity in stock
• Alternative medicine (if out of stock)

Other commands:
/help - Show this help message
/status - Check application status
telegram.available:
{{medicine}} – available
- MRP: ₹ {{mrp}} per unit
- Quantity in stock: {{quantity}} units
telegram.outOfStock:
{{medicine}} – out of stock
- MRP: ₹ {{mrp}} per unit
- Quantity in stock: {{quantity}} units
- Alternative suggested: {{alternativeName}} (MRP: ₹ {{altMrp}}, Quantity: {{altQuantity}} units)
telegram.notFound: Sorry, I couldn't find information for "{{medicine}}". Please check the spelling or try another name.
telegram.status:
🤖 AI Pharmacy Bot Status: Online
📊 Database: Connected ({{totalMedicines}} medicines registered)
⏰ Uptime: Running since startup
🔄 Polling: Active

booking.appointmentConfirm: Hello {{patientName}}, your appointment with Dr. {{doctorName}} is confirmed for {{dateTime}} at {{location}}. Reference ID: {{bookingId}}.
booking.appointmentReminder: Hi {{patientName}}, this is a reminder for your upcoming appointment with Dr. {{doctorName}} tomorrow at {{dateTime}}.
booking.appointmentRescheduled: Hello {{patientName}}, your appointment with Dr. {{doctorName}} has been rescheduled to {{dateTime}}. Booking ID: {{bookingId}}.
booking.appointmentCancelled: Hello {{patientName}}, your appointment with Dr. {{doctorName}} on {{dateTime}} has been cancelled. If this was unexpected, please contact us.
booking.preOrderConfirm: Dear Customer, your pre-booking for {{medicineName}} (Qty: {{quantity}}) is confirmed. We will notify you once it arrives. ID: {{bookingId}}.
booking.preOrderAvailable: Good news {{patientName}}! Your pre-ordered medicine {{medicineName}} is now available. We have reserved it for you until {{expiryDate}}.
booking.preOrderReminder: Friendly reminder: Your pre-booked medicine {{medicineName}} is reserved and ready for pickup at {{location}}.
booking.labTestConfirm: Hi {{patientName}}, your booking for the {{testName}} is confirmed for {{dateTime}} at {{location}}.
booking.labSampleCollection: Dear {{patientName}}, our lab technician {{technicianName}} (Phone: {{technicianPhone}}) will arrive for home sample collection on {{dateTime}}.
booking.labReportReady: Hello {{patientName}}, your lab test report for {{testName}} is ready. Download it here: {{reportUrl}}.
booking.homeDeliveryConfirm: Your home delivery booking is confirmed. Your items will be delivered to {{address}} on {{dateTime}}.
booking.deliverySlotChange: Hello {{patientName}}, your delivery slot has been changed. New expected delivery: {{dateTime}}.
booking.outForDelivery: Your order with Booking ID {{bookingId}} is out for delivery. Agent: {{agentName}} (Phone: {{agentPhone}}).
booking.vaccinationConfirm: Hi {{patientName}}, your vaccination booking for {{vaccineName}} (Dose: {{doseNumber}}) is confirmed on {{dateTime}}.
booking.vaccinationSecondDose: Hi {{patientName}}, you are due for your second dose of {{vaccineName}}. Book your slot here: {{bookingUrl}}.
booking.teleconsultationLink: Hello {{patientName}}, your teleconsultation with Dr. {{doctorName}} starts at {{dateTime}}. Join using this link: {{meetingUrl}}.
booking.healthCheckupConfirm: Your Master Health Checkup is booked for {{dateTime}}. Please fast for 10-12 hours prior to the test.
booking.bookingPaymentSuccess: Payment of ₹{{amount}} received successfully for Booking ID {{bookingId}}. Thank you!
booking.bookingFeedback: Hi {{patientName}}, thank you for choosing us. How was your experience? Rate us here: {{feedbackUrl}}.
booking.prescriptionUploadNeeded: Attention {{patientName}}: To complete your booking for {{medicineName}}, please upload a valid prescription here: {{uploadUrl}}.
booking.specialRequest_1: Hi {{patientName}}, we have registered your special request for {{medicineName}} (Qty: {{quantity}}). Ref: {{bookingId}}.
booking.specialRequest_2: Hello {{patientName}}, your pre-booking request for {{quantity}} units of {{medicineName}} is successful. Order ID: {{bookingId}}.
booking.specialRequest_3: Dear {{patientName}}, your request for {{medicineName}} ({{quantity}} units) is logged. We are sourcing it for you. Ref: {{bookingId}}.
booking.specialRequest_4: Greetings {{patientName}}! We've received your medicine request for {{medicineName}}. Quantity: {{quantity}}. ID: {{bookingId}}.
booking.specialRequest_5: Thank you {{patientName}} for pre-booking {{medicineName}} (Qty: {{quantity}}) with us. Booking Reference: {{bookingId}}.
booking.specialRequest_6: Hi {{patientName}}, {{quantity}} x {{medicineName}} has been added to your special request queue. We will track this via ID {{bookingId}}.
booking.specialRequest_7: Hello {{patientName}}, your booking for {{medicineName}} (Qty: {{quantity}}) is now active. Ref: {{bookingId}}.
booking.specialRequest_8: Dear Customer {{patientName}}, we are procuring {{medicineName}} (Qty: {{quantity}}) per your special request {{bookingId}}.
booking.specialRequest_9: Hi {{patientName}}, your request for {{medicineName}} (Qty: {{quantity}}) is confirmed in our database under reference {{bookingId}}.
booking.specialRequest_10: Hello {{patientName}}, pre-order for {{quantity}} pcs of {{medicineName}} is successfully registered. Booking ID: {{bookingId}}.
booking.specialRequest_11: Hi {{patientName}}, we've created a custom procurement request for {{medicineName}} (Qty: {{quantity}}). ID: {{bookingId}}.
booking.specialRequest_12: Dear {{patientName}}, the booking for {{medicineName}} (Qty: {{quantity}}) has been initiated. Reference number: {{bookingId}}.
booking.specialRequest_13: Hi {{patientName}}, your priority request for {{medicineName}} (Qty: {{quantity}}) is confirmed. Booking ID: {{bookingId}}.
booking.specialRequest_14: Greetings! Your request for {{quantity}} units of {{medicineName}} has been placed. Tracking ID: {{bookingId}}.
booking.specialRequest_15: Hi {{patientName}}! We're processing your request for {{medicineName}} (Qty: {{quantity}}). Ref No: {{bookingId}}.
booking.specialRequest_16: Hello {{patientName}}, your back-order request for {{medicineName}} (Qty: {{quantity}}) is active. ID: {{bookingId}}.
booking.specialRequest_17: Dear {{patientName}}, your special order for {{medicineName}} (Qty: {{quantity}}) is documented. ID: {{bookingId}}.
booking.specialRequest_18: Hi {{patientName}}, we have received your request for {{medicineName}} (Qty: {{quantity}}). Booking Reference: {{bookingId}}.
booking.specialRequest_19: Hello {{patientName}}, your priority pre-booking for {{medicineName}} (Qty: {{quantity}}) is accepted. Ref: {{bookingId}}.
booking.specialRequest_20: Dear {{patientName}}, your special request ticket #{{bookingId}} for {{medicineName}} (Qty: {{quantity}}) is created.
booking.inventoryReminder_1: Hi {{patientName}}! Good news: {{medicineName}} is now back in stock! We have reserved {{quantity}} units for you. ID: {{bookingId}}.
booking.inventoryReminder_2: Hello {{patientName}}, the medicine {{medicineName}} from special request {{bookingId}} is ready. Visit us to collect it.

booking.inventoryReminder_7: Hi {{patientName}}! We are happy to inform you that {{medicineName}} (Qty: {{quantity}}) is available now. Ref: {{bookingId}}.
booking.inventoryReminder_8: Dear Customer, {{medicineName}} is back in our inventory. We have kept {{quantity}} units aside for you. Booking ID: {{bookingId}}.
booking.inventoryReminder_9: Hi {{patientName}}, your reserved stock of {{medicineName}} has arrived. Reference order ID: {{bookingId}}.
booking.inventoryReminder_10: Hello {{patientName}}, update on request {{bookingId}}: {{medicineName}} is in stock. Please visit us to collect.
booking.inventoryReminder_11: Hi {{patientName}}, the wait is over! {{medicineName}} (Qty: {{quantity}}) is now ready. Reference ID: {{bookingId}}.
booking.inventoryReminder_12: Dear {{patientName}}, your special request medicine {{medicineName}} is now available in our store. ID: {{bookingId}}.
booking.inventoryReminder_13: Greetings! The items for booking ID {{bookingId}} ({{medicineName}}) are in stock and ready.
booking.inventoryReminder_14: Hi {{patientName}}! We have successfully secured {{medicineName}} (Qty: {{quantity}}) for you. Ref ID: {{bookingId}}.
booking.inventoryReminder_15: Hello {{patientName}}, your pre-ordered drug {{medicineName}} is waiting for you at the counter. Ref: {{bookingId}}.
booking.inventoryReminder_16: Dear {{patientName}}, your priority stock of {{medicineName}} has arrived. Please collect at your earliest convenience. ID: {{bookingId}}.
booking.inventoryReminder_17: Hi {{patientName}}, we have received stock for {{medicineName}} (booking ID: {{bookingId}}). Ready for pickup!
booking.inventoryReminder_18: Hello {{patientName}}, your requested medicine {{medicineName}} (Qty: {{quantity}}) is ready at our pharmacy. ID: {{bookingId}}.

whatsapp.expiryAlert:
⚠️ *दवा समाप्ति警報*

whatsapp.refillReminder:
🙏 *{{pharmacyName}} से रिफिल prom*
नमस्ते {{patientName}}, यह एक मैत्रीपूर्ण अनुस्मारक है कि आपकी {{medicineName}} की रिफिल {{dueDate}} को देय है।
आपके पास {{quantityLeft}} {{unit}} बचे हैं। कृपया फ़ार्मेसी आकर अपनी रिफिल की पुष्टि करने के लिए "REFILL" उत्तर दें।
धन्यवाद!
whatsapp.orderStatus:
📦 *आर्डर अपडेट*
आपका ऑर्डर #{{orderId}} प्राप्त हो गया है और तैयार किया जा रहा है।
उपलब्ध होने की संभावित समय: {{pickupTime}}।
किसी भी प्रश्न के लिए उत्तर दें।

telegram.welcome:
AI फार्मेसी बॉट में आपका स्वागत है!

आप दो तरीकों से दवा की उपलब्धता जाँच सकते हैं:
1. कमांड का उपयोग करें: /check <दवा>
2. सीधे दवा का नाम लिखें (उदा., पैरासेटामोल)

अन्य कमांड:
/help - pomoc संदेश देखें
/status - एप्लीकेशन स्थिति देखें
telegram.help:
AI फार्मेसी बॉट उपयोग:

1. direkten दवा नाम: बस दवा का नाम भेजें (उदा., पैरासेटामोल)
2. कमांड प्रारूप: /check <दवा> का उपयोग करें (उदा., /check पैरासेटामोल)

दोनों तरीकों से दिखेगा:
• उपलब्धता स्थिति
• MRP (प्रति इकाई मूल्य)
• स्टॉक में मात्र
• वैकल्पिक दवा (यदि स्टॉक में नहीं)

अन्य कमांड:
/help - pomoc संदेश देखें
/status - एप्लीकेशन स्थिति देखें

whatsapp.refillReminder:
🙏 *{{pharmacyName}} पासून रिफिल शैक्षणिक*
नमस्कार {{patientName}}, हे एक मैत्रीपूर्ण सुचना आहे की तुमच्याकडील {{medicineName}} ची रिफिल {{dueDate}} रोजी पायाभावी आहे.
तुमच्या पास {{quantityLeft}} {{unit}} शेष आहेत. कृपया ओषधीशाळेत जाण्यावर तुमचा रिफिल bestätigt करण्यासाठी "REFILL" उत्तर द्या.

तुमचा ORDER #{{orderId}} मिळवला आहे व तयार होत आहे.
तयार होकर मिळवण्याची शक्यता वेळ: {{pickupTime}}.
कोणतेही प्रश्न असतील तर उत्तर द्या.

telegram.welcome:
AI pharmaceutics बॉटमध्ये आपले स्वागत आहे!

तुम्ही दोन पद्धतींने औषध्याची उपलब्धता तपासू शकता:
1. निर्देशांचा वापर करा: /check <औषध>
2. सीधे औषधाचे नाव लिहा (उदा., पारासेामो)

अन्य निर्देशे:
/help - मदत संदेश पहा
/status - अॅप्लिकेशन स्थिती पहा
telegram.help:
AI औषधशाळा बॉट वापर:

1. सीधे औषधे नाव: फक्त औषधेचे नाव पाठवा (उदा., पारासेटीमॉल)
2. निर्देशाचा स्वरूप: /check <औषध> वापरा (उदा., /check पारासेटीमॉल)

दोना पद्धतींपूर्वे दिसेल:
• उपलब्धता स्थिती
• MRP (प्रति युनिट किमत)
• स्टॉक मध्ये प्रमाण: {{quantity}} युनिटे
• पर्याय औषध (अगर स्टॉक नाही)

अन्य निर्देशे:
/help - मदत संदेश पहा
/status - अॅप्लिकेशन स्थिती पहा
telegram.available:

- स्टॉक मध्ये प्रमाण: {{quantity}} युनिटे

- MRP: ₹ {{mrp}} प्रति युनिट
- स्टॉक मध्ये प्रमाण: {{quantity}} युनिटे
- पर्याय koostavit: {{alternativeName}} (MRP: ₹ {{altMrp}}, प्रमाण: {{altQuantity}} युनिटे)
